name: Ink Business Cash® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: $750 cash back (or 75,000 points if transferred to Ink Business Preferred/Ink Business Premier) after spending $6,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on office supplies and print services (up to $25,000 per year)
5% cash back on internet, cable, and phone services (up to $25,000 per year)
2% cash back at gas stations (up to $25,000 per year)
2% cash back at restaurants (up to $25,000 per year)
1% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost

other_benefits.name: Purchase Protection
other_benefits.description: Covers new purchases against damage or theft for 120 days

other_benefits.name: Extended Warranty
other_benefits.description: Extends U.S. manufacturer warranty by 1 year

other_benefits.name: Travel and Emergency Assistance
other_benefits.description: Access to travel and emergency services

notes: No annual fee business card with strong 5% categories. Must pair with Ink Business Preferred or Ink Business Premier to transfer points to travel partners (standalone, points are cash back only). Office supply stores and utilities are common business expenses. The $25,000 caps per category are reasonable. Great companion card to Ink Preferred for the 5% categories.
